title: Midnight L'Amore
description: A tender and spicy lamb dish served with toasted halal-friendly bread to satisfy midnight cravings for Italian cuisine.
instructions: Season lamb with salt and pepper, rub it generously with olive oil.
Sear the lamb in a hot pan until golden brown on all sides. Remove from heat and set aside.
In another skillet, sauté minced garlic and crushed red chili flakes in remaining olive oil until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Place the seasoned lamb back into the skillet with garlic mixture. Add fresh thyme leaves and black peppercorns. Cover with a lid or aluminum foil to seal in heat for approximately 30 minutes.
Toast slices of bread lightly on a toaster or pan until golden brown. Serve the lamb hot over toasted bread, garnished with chopped parsley.
